desc: Draft upstream contributions for the remote dev-loop host tools other M4 owners will need: macvdmtool fork commands (actions/vdm/dven/localserial + NOPASSWD reboot flow), kisd t6040 KIS base 0x548700000 auto-detect, and m1n1 proxyclient pty support (DEVLOG Host prerequisites + The DebugUSB link). Drafts/PR branches only; CJ posts
author: fable
